---
title: "Machine Learning"
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort: "order asc"
---
```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700&family=PT+Sans:wght@400;700&display=swap');
body { font-family: 'PT Sans', sans-serif; }
h1, h2, h3, h4 { font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; }
</style>
```


## Topics

Notes from the [Machine Learning Specialization](https://www.coursera.org/specializations/machine-learning-introduction) by Andrew Ng (DeepLearning.AI / Stanford).

### Notes
